Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 230 

SS_LS_SNF_IND_CD 

LABEL: Short Stay/Long Stay/SNF Provider Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating whether the stay is a short stay, long stay, or skilled nursing facility (SNF). 

SHORT NAME: SSLSSNF 

LONG NAME: SS_LS_SNF_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: N = SNF Stay (3rd digit of Provider ID = 5, 6, U, W, Y, or Z) 
S = Short-Stay (3rd digit of Provider ID =
